data_retention_time_in_days.description: number of days to retain the old version of deleted/updated data

max_data_extension_time_in_days.description: Maximum number of days to extend data retention beyond the retention period to prevent a stream becoming stale.

change_tracking.description: True if change tracking is enabled, allowing streams and CHANGES to be used on the entity.

default_ddl_collation.description: Collation that is used for all the new columns created by the DDL statements (if not specified)

comment.description: user comment associated to an object in the dictionary

created_on.description: Date and time when the event table was created.

database_name.description: Database in which the event table is stored

schema_name.description: Schema in which the event table is stored

owner.description: Role that owns the event table

owner_role_type.description: The type of role that owns the event table

rows.description: Number of rows in the table.

bytes.description: Number of bytes that will be scanned if the entire table is scanned in a query.Note that this number may be different than the number of actual physical bytes stored on-disk for the table

automatic_clustering.description: If Automatic Clustering is enabled for your account, specifies whether it is explicitly enabled or disabled for the table.

search_optimization.description: If ON, the table has the search optimization service enabled

search_optimization_progress.description: Percentage of the table that has been optimized for search

search_optimization_bytes.description: Number of additional bytes of storage that the search optimization service consumes for this table
